name: Morning Glory Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 large Tart green apple, peeled, cored, and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak raisins in hot water to cover for 30 minutes.
2. Drain thoroughly.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Generously grease fifteen 1/2-cup muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
5. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
6. Stir in raisins, carrots, apple, nuts, and coconut until combined.
7. Beat eggs with oil and vanilla to blend.
8. Stir the egg mixture into the flour mixture until just combined.
9. Divide batter among muffin cups.
10. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes (25 to 35 minutes), or until muffins are golden brown and a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool muffins for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
12. Serve at room temperature.
